## Transcript Highlights

### 1. Improving incomplete features generated by Claude (Session 2, midway)

After asking claude to create the search and filtering features, I checked the work the AI gave and realized it made a couple mistakes. I descrubed these mistakes and explained in more specific language exactly what needed to be added and tweaked with these features in their current state.

### 2. Fixing two issues that Claude overlooked (Session 2, midway)

I double checked the search and filtering features after my previous prompt to ensure everything was in place, but found two small errors. I described the errors to claude and tweaked the features to address the misleading text in the search bar and adding in the option to filter by rating. Claude had glossed over the rating filter despite my previous prompt which mentioned it, which reinforced the idea that I should be paying close attention to the changes made after each prompt.

### 3. Taking an incremental approach to implemented features (Session 4, near the end)

Claude has a tendency to go overboard and do more than is asked unless otherwise stated, so I prompted it help set up a cloud database using Supabase in an incremental fashion. I asked it to set things up without including UI yet and to just focus on code first and foremost so that I could ensure things worked as expected before moving forward.
